Game Name: Chaos Code: New Sign of Catastrophe
Rules-Game Settings: Default game settings, sidebars on, boss mode banned, chaos mode banned.
Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Finals-Games per Set: 3/5 Games for Losers Finals, 3/5 Games for Winners Finals, 3/5 Games for Grand Finals
Rules-Notes: all stages are legal but if there's disagreement on which stage to pick lupinus stage (military base) is the community default. If a player requests blind pick characters will be chosen, then revealed, then extra moves will be chosen. Winner must keep their character, but can change extra moves, loser can switch characters as well as extra moves.

Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Finals-Games per Set: 3/5 Games for Losers Finals, 3/5 Games for Winners Finals, 3/5 Games for Grand Finals
Rules-Notes:
Brook Converters provided rather than requiring players bring their own. Converters are put in force digital mode (LED on the new model converter should be blue). (Ideally brook would make a tournament firmware that always forces digital mode when its flashed onto converter but they havent done it) This is more strictly enforced if a persons controller is capable of an uncleaned socd whether pure dpad or dpad + analog stick.
Instant super buttons are banned. Converter remap function is allowed, turbo not. (Please reset the converter bindings to default when you hop off if you use this function)

Pause penalty: round loss. Enforced as player eating penalty has to afk for the rest of the round

Games will be played in Arcade mode not Versus mode, for convenience.
players RPS/coin toss for choice of side or first stage. Loser gets the one the winner didn't pick. Person who gets side picks side, players pick characters (soft double blind), then person who didn't get first stage select gets to strike 3 stages for game 1. Player who gets first stage picks from the remaining 7. After game 1, loser can change character and stage (winner must keep character), they cannot change the stage to a stage they've already won on (hitting instant rematch is fine).
Rules-Glitches: There is a glitch where both players may be transported out of bounds and may be unable to move normally.  The round should continue and the players should forward dash to get out of this state.  If a player pauses during this glitch it may not count against them as this is not common knowledge.

Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Finals-Games per Set: 3/5 Games for Losers Finals, 3/5 Games for Winners Finals, 3/5 Games for Grand Finals
Rules-Notes: Winner must keep collab; loser may switch
$-Prizes:
Top 3 will receive custom hitboxes.
Top 4 will receive wall scrolls featuring character art from the Character Select Screen.
Top 8 will receive an acrylic stand of an in-game sprite of one of the fighters.
Stickers of the "Idol Showdown Next Fes" logo will be at the setup!
Info-Comments:
Last year, we ran the game entirely on Vortex Gallery-provided monitors and Micro-PCs.
If we could do the same this year, it would be ideal! If not, we should be able to provide 2 devices the game can run on as well as 1 monitor.

Last year, we ran 4 setups - it worked, but ran slightly behind schedule. I've listed 4 setups as needed, but we should be OK with 4.
